"'''Making ''Star Wars'' Comics Come Alive'''" is an interview article published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] in which [[Ilene Rosenberg]] discusses the process of creating the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] comics with [[Tom Veitch]], [[Chris Gossett]], and [[Dan Thorsland]].
